titleStmt.title: SII 38.225: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 225. (A.R. No. 225 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the east wall of the maṇḍapa infront of the Naṭarāja shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Kumāra Bukkaṇṇa. Year: Kshaya, Kumbha śu. di [14], Friday, Pūśam f.d.t. 04. f.d.t. 80 = February 1, 1387 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged. Registers the assignment of poṉvari collected from 2500 kuḻi of land as tirunāmattukkāṇi by Aiññūṟṟuttalaikkōli, one of the dancing-girls of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr temple for conducting a service called Aiññūṟṟuttalaikkōli sandhi after the early morning service, probably on the day of Tiruvādirai every month.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiruvāykkeḻvi muṉṉāka viraśrīkumārapukkaṇṇa Uṭaiyaṟkkuc cellā niṉṟa kṣayavaruṣam
kumpanāyaṟṟup pūrvvapakṣattu caturttaciyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattu nāḷ
Uṭaiyār tiruoṟṟiyūruṭaiyanāyaṉār koyil patiyilāril nācci
Aiññūṟṟuttalait perumāḷukkup poṟ tiruvātirai
ttuc cāttu cai kkukkuṭutta tirunāmattukkāṇi
ṉikaḷk koḷḷa kuḻi Iraṇṭāyirattuaiññūṟṟukku Uḷḷa
muṭaimai poṉvariyāl Uḷḷa mutal koṇṭu ciṟukālaic cantikkuppiṉpu
Aiññūṟṟuttalaikkolicanti Ākac cantirātittavarai
yum naṭakka kaṭavatu Ākavum Ippaṭikku Ivai panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 38.225 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
